_about: Grove 2026-03 settlement fixture, captured 2026-04-27 via MCP. Pin blocks: EoM=24781026 (2026-03-31 23:59:59 UTC), SoM=24558867 (2026-02-28 23:59:59 UTC).

debt._note: Truncated to key inflection points; cum_debt EOM = $2.81B verified from full Dune output.

subproxy_usds._note: Grove subproxy holds ~$1.88M USDS, much smaller than the ~$22.7M reported in docs/grove/README.md. Discrepancy: README snapshot is from a later date OR the subproxy got topped up via a path not visible in tokens.transfers (e.g. internal mint via Vow.suck).

subproxy_susds._note: Grove subproxy never held sUSDS during this period.

alm_usds._note: All daily_net = 0 — USDS flows through ALM atomically (mint → swap to USDC/AUSD/RLUSD → deposit to venues). The trailing 7.45e-9 is float rounding noise.

v3_liquidity_events_e12._note: Q1 2026 V3 events for Grove ALM tokenId 1192575. One IncreaseLiquidity event on 2026-02-04 (block 24384502): $25M USDC + $0 AUSD = $25M inflow into LP. No DecreaseLiquidity events.

atoken_e1_mints._about: E1 aHorRwaRLUSD mints (Aave Pool → ALM) since prime start. Used as cost-basis inflow for Cat C inflow tracking.

atoken_e1_burns._about: E1 aHorRwaRLUSD burns (ALM → 0x0). $4.96M burn on 2026-03-02 contributes to E1 period_inflow. Net E1 deposits since prime start = $144.3M − $9.9M = $134.4M.

atoken_e2_mints._about: E2 aHorRwaUSDC mints since prime start.

atoken_e2_burns._about: E2 aHorRwaUSDC burns (ALM exited entirely 2026-02-19, before settlement period).

atoken_e3_mints._about: E3 aEthRLUSD mints (Aave Pool → ALM) since prime start.

atoken_e3_burns._about: E3 aEthRLUSD burns (ALM → 0x0). $124.8M of burns during March 2026 — explains the -$125M Δvalue, all rebalancing not loss.

vault_e4_mints._about: E4 grove-bbqUSDC-V2 (Steakhouse USDC) share mints since prime start. Cat B 4626 at-block-pps × $1 USDC.

vault_e19_mints._about: E19 grove-bbqUSDC (Base) share mints. One $984K capital deposit on 2026-01-19; no in-period activity → period_inflow = 0, revenue = pure pps yield.

vault_e19_burns._about: E19 grove-bbqUSDC (Base) share burns. None observed.

cum_balance_e20._about: E20 JAAA-avalanche ALM net flow. 5 deposits in Aug-Sep 2025 totaling 250M tokens. No in-period activity → period_inflow = 0. Real revenue comes from NAV growth via cross-chain Chronicle (Ethereum oracle).

cum_balance_e21._about: E21 GACLO-1 (Avalanche) ALM net flow. One deposit on 2025-12-16 of 49.9M tokens. No in-period activity. NAV oracle = const_one (Galaxy provides API-only pricing); under-counts NAV-based yield as a documented limitation.

cum_balance_e22._about: E22 ACRDX (Plume) ALM net flow. Three deposits in October 2025 totaling 50.014M tokens. No in-period activity. NAV oracle = cross-chain Chronicle (read on Ethereum at 0x51cC9463...). NAV dropped −0.69% in March 2026 → expected revenue ≈ −$351K (real fund loss).

cum_balance_e7._about: E7 STAC ALM net daily balance flow. Cat E uses cumulative_balance, not mint/burn — STAC inflow comes via custodian flows.

cum_balance_e8._about: E8 JAAA-eth ALM net daily balance flow.

cum_balance_e9._about: E9 JTRSY ALM net daily balance flow. cum_balance × NAV ≈ position value (matched: $1.05B × $1.10 ≈ $1.16B EoM).

cum_balance_e13._about: E13 RLUSD raw ALM net flow. In-period: zero net (any RLUSD that flowed in from E3 aRLUSD redemptions was immediately swapped to USDC).
cum_balance_e13._note: Trimmed to period anchors — in-and-out flows balance to ~0 throughout history (last ~0 anchor on 2026-02-12).

cum_balance_e14._about: E14 AUSD raw ALM net flow. In-period in/out flows totaled 0 — empty fixture lets compute correctly resolve cum_inflow=0 at both anchors. (Including only partial daily_net rows would trick the helper, which recomputes cum_inflow from daily_net cumsum and would lose the canceling rows.)

cum_balance_e15._about: E15 USDC raw ALM net flow. $9.99M arrived on 2026-03-31 (residue from E3 aRLUSD withdrawal pipeline). period_inflow = $9.99M netted out by RPC-observed value of $9.99M → revenue = 0.

cum_balance_e16._about: E16 DAI raw ALM net flow. Zero throughout — Grove never holds DAI on ETH ALM during this period.

cum_balance_e17._about: E17 USDS raw / POL ALM net flow. In/out flows balance during the period. Note: this balance is also netted out of `utilized` in sky_revenue (cum_alm_usds), so including it here as a venue does not double-count.

cum_balance_e18._about: E18 sUSDS raw / POL ALM net flow. Zero throughout — Grove never holds sUSDS on ETH ALM during this period.

cum_balance_e10._about: E10 BUIDL ALM capital-only flow (transfers ≥ $1M only). Filters out small daily yield-distribution mints ($10K-$200K each from BlackRock's BUIDL contract) so revenue = Δvalue − capital_inflow correctly attributes yield. Bimodal histogram (run 7387737) confirmed clean separation: yield mints all <$1M, capital subscriptions all >$10M.
cum_balance_e10._note_off_chain_gap: On-chain balanceOf at EoM = $706.75M; sum of ALL Transfer events to/from ALM = $532.48M; capital-only sum (this fixture) = $698.28M. Gap of ~$175M (constant at SoM and EoM) reflects an off-Transfer mechanism in the BUIDL contract that pre-dates the period; doesn't affect period revenue.

inflow_by_counterparty_e15._about: E15 USDC per-day per-counterparty signed flow at Grove ALM (0x491edfb0...). Used for Cat A source-tagged inflow netting. Rows where counterparty ∈ prime.internal_alm_sources are subtracted from Δvalue; remaining (external) flows pass through to revenue.

vault_e23_mints._about: E23 steakUSDC-PrimeInstant (Base, Morpho V2) share mints to Grove ALM. 4 capital deposits in March 2026 totaling $34.34M.

vault_e23_burns._about: E23 steakUSDC-PrimeInstant (Base) share burns from Grove ALM. 2 redemptions in March totaling $18.65M.

psm_usds._about: USDS Grove parked at Spark PSM (subproxy + ALM proxy → PSM, net of withdrawals). Returned zero rows — Grove uses the PSM as a USDS↔USDC swap conduit, not as an idle deposit. Contribution to utilized = $0 for March 2026.

nav_overrides._about: Historical NAV values for venues where Chronicle returned 0x at older blocks (oracle not yet deployed). Values are best-effort approximations based on deposit price (par) since the on-chain feed had not yet started writing.

rows._note: STAC deposit-time par; Chronicle had not yet started writing
ACRDX deposit-time par; Chronicle had not yet started writing for older blocks
